## Product

Choose one: Guard / Handoff / Audit / Shield / Matrix proof

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

What should the command or document do?

## Boundary Check

- [ ] This stays inside local Guard, Handoff, Audit, Shield, or matrix proof behavior.
- [ ] This does not require hosted verification.
- [ ] This does not require a public leaderboard.
- [ ] This does not claim certification.
- [ ] This does not claim operating-system sandboxing.
- [ ] This does not require uploading source code, raw diffs, prompts, model responses, secrets, credentials, or private payloads.

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler path did you consider?
